result.reason: External tools fail to launch when only the executable name is provided and 'RunElevated' is false, due to 'Process.Start' not searching the PATH environment variable in this configuration.
result.approach: Implement a helper method in 'ExternalTool.cs' to resolve the full path of executables by searching the system's PATH environment variable. This resolution will be applied to the 'FileName' property before validation and before setting 'Process.StartInfo.FileName', but after variable parsing.
